name: Orrön Energy AB
description: Orrön Energy is an independent, publicly listed renewable energy company that operates and develops onshore renewable energy assets to create long-term shareholder value. The company’s core portfolio consists of high-quality wind power assets in the Nordics, complemented by greenfield growth opportunities in onshore wind, solar, batteries, and data centers across the Nordics, the UK, Germany, and France. Backed by a strong financial position and an experienced management team, Orrön Energy is dedicated to contributing to a sustainable energy future while leveraging its expertise to grow successful businesses through the ongoing energy transition.
